hook: CBT-I can improve sleep better than sleeping pills, yet most people have never heard of it.

script.hook: CBT-I can improve sleep better than sleeping pills, yet most people have never heard of it.
beats: CBT-I, or Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Insomnia, addresses the behaviors and thoughts that maintain insomnia.
Unlike sleeping pills, which only mask symptoms, CBT-I targets the root causes, helping 75-80% of chronic insomniacs.
However, the treatment can be uncomfortable at first, and many abandon it before seeing results.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a person struggling to sleep with pills on the nightstand.
